narrative:
Preble Shawnee Local Sd (Preble) school district has 6,079 registered voters, with 54.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 26.6 percentage points.
